series_metadata.series_title: Administrative hearing records for driver license suspension cases
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains Bureau of Motor Vehicle (BMV) adjudication/administrative orders related to driver license suspension cases and records of appeal that are filed with the courts of common pleas pursuant to Chapter 119. of the Revised Code.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the Office of Legal Services. Retain adjudication/administrative orders for one year from date of issuance and records of appeal for one year following date on which all appeals have run. ; Electronic: Retain in the Office of Legal Services. Retain adjudication/administrative orders for one year from date of issuance and records of appeal for one year following date on which all appeals have run., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
